MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Nicole Child, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lorelei Lee Cooney, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter is submitted and is taken under submission, counsel to prepare Proposed Judgment for signature.
